description.en: MyPassword is a tool for managing website passwords and enables automatic password filling via a browser plugin.
description.zh: MyPassword是一个管理网站密码的工具，并通过浏览器插件实现自动填充密码。

description.en: Crypto Drive allows users to map local directories as virtual disks. Writing to the virtual disk is automatically encrypted and supports S3 cloud synchronization.
description.zh: Crypto Drive允许用户将本地目录映射为虚拟盘，通过虚拟盘写入会自动加密，并支持S3云同步。

description.en: AsciiDraw is an online website for creating ASCII diagrams, allowing users to easily create and share ASCII diagrams.
description.zh: AsciiDraw是一个在线制作ASCII图表的网站，允许用户轻松创建和分享ASCII图表。

description.en: An online periodic table that provides detailed information and interactive features for elements, making it easy to learn and look up chemical elements.
description.zh: 一个在线元素周期表，提供元素的详细信息和交互式功能，方便学习和查询化学元素。

description.en: An online tool for generating .gitignore files for various programming languages and frameworks.
description.zh: 为各种编程语言和框架生成.gitignore文件的在线工具。
